Every Parent Thinks About This

Is Your Child Ready for a World That Runs on AI & Robots?

The gap between children who understand technology and those who don't is growing every single year. The question isn't whether your child needs these skills — it's whether they'll get them in time.

Screen time with no learning value

Endless scrolling replaces structured skill-building during the most critical developmental years.

Schools teach theory, not application

Traditional education rarely covers robotics, AI, or coding in a hands-on, meaningful way.

The world is changing faster than ever

By 2030, most jobs will require tech fluency. Early exposure makes all the difference.

Not sure where to start

With so many options, parents struggle to find age-appropriate, structured tech education.

Branky STEM Labs is the answer.

Structured programs for ages 4–14 · Smart labs · Expert mentors · Vadodara

Book Free Demo →
Programs

A Learning Journey for Every Young Tech Explorer

A progressive learning journey that grows with your child's skills, creativity and ambition.

Age: 4–6 Years
Structured Learning Program

STEM Foundations Program

  • Early Robotics & STEM Exploration
  • Logic Building, Creativity & Engineering Concepts
  • Button-Based Coding & Interactive Activities
Know More →
Age: 7–10 Years
120 Hours Program

Foundation of Robotics – Level 1

  • Robotics, Electronics & Circuit Flow
  • Sensors, Mechanics & Robot Building
  • Block Coding & Technology Fundamentals
Know More →
Age: 7–10 Years
120 Hours Program

Advanced Robotics – Level 2

  • Advanced Robotics & Smart Systems
  • Intelligent Sensors & Logic Programming
  • Basic AI Concepts & Technical Projects
Know More →
Age: 11–14 Years
120 Hours Program

Core Robotics & Coding Program

  • Robotics Engineering & Coding Concepts
  • Electronics, Machine Systems & Programming
  • Problem Solving & Project Development
Know More →
Age: 11–14 Years
120 Hours Program

Advanced Robotics, IoT & Smart Machines

  • IoT Systems & Smart Machine Development
  • Automation Logic & Connected Technologies
  • Advanced Projects & Real-World Applications
Know More →

Branky in Action

A Space Built for Curious Minds

At Branky STEM Labs, we believe technology is best understood through building, experimenting and creating. Our hands-on environment keeps young minds curious, engaged and actively exploring.

Dedicated Robotics LabPurpose-built lab with advanced kits
AC ClassroomsComfortable, focused environment
Advanced Robotics KitsLatest equipment for every program
Electronics & Coding SetupProfessional-grade workstations
Practical WorkstationsHands-on project building spaces
Small Batch Sizes8–12 students per batch

Empowering Young Innovators for Tomorrow's World.
